claim_text: 1 INTRODUCTION 1.1 Metabolic Reprogramming Two fundamental metrics of tumor metabolism are total glucose (Glc) consumption and the relative fraction of Glc undergoing glycolysis (GLY) versus oxidative phosphorylation (OXPHOS)1 .
